title: Check final report schema and claim traceability
scope: Validate the final JSON report's structure and traceability before factual verification.
goals: Confirm major recommendations trace to source-backed worker findings or are labeled inference/speculation.
Confirm VS Code and Obsidian are addressed separately and jointly.
non_goals: Do not perform a broad factual web audit.
If narrow source checks are needed, use the web-discovery workflow with ketch.
Do not rewrite the whole report.
safety: Do not read tmp/, archive/, or prompt-buffer.md.
Do not edit files tagged human-written.
Do not use browser automation or sessionful retrieval.
If a small report patch is needed, keep it minimal and document it.
success_criteria: Final report remains parseable by jq.
